response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of polyglot engineering across web, embedded, and distributed data systems, with demonstrable production experience at scale (Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP req/s) and craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, statistical analysis, or telemetry/measurement infrastructure — the core of this Principal/IC6 role. Background is primarily IC craftsman rather than systemic platform architect influencing multiple teams.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering (TS, Node, C/C++, Java, DLang) meets language breadth requirement
Proven high-scale low-latency production experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, OSS platform ownership (GISCollective), teaching/mentoring track record
concerns: No demonstrable experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/bias-detection work
Career level reads as Senior/Staff IC rather than Principal/IC6 cross-org platform leader
